untranslatable_reason: The signal requires comparison of current price against prices 30 and 40 days ago. The allowed indicators only support prev_close (1 bar ago) and standard moving averages (sma_30, sma_40). Historical price values at arbitrary past bars (close[30d_ago], close[40d_ago]) are not in the allowed indicator set. To implement this signal, either add 30-day and 40-day lookback price indicators, or use sma_30 and sma_40 as proxies for historical price levels.
translation_notes: Signal logic is clear (mean-reversion with dual lookback periods), but the backtest engine's indicator library does not support direct historical price indexing beyond 1 bar. The strategy would require custom indicator support or reformulation using moving averages as price-level proxies.
